falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (2024 August bottom resistance level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a bullish breakout invalidating the 'hold' signal by demonstrating clear trend reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would indicate extreme momentum contradicting the current 'unknown' phase assessment

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern similarity drops below 60% while the VIX index rises above 30
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This divergence would invalidate the 84% pattern match by showing conflicting volatility and price behavior

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
